name: Sweet-Sour Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Pork spareribs (cut in serving-size pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread ribs, meaty side up, in a single layer shallow pan.
2. Brown in 425 degree oven for 20 minutes; drain off fat.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (except salt and pepper) in a saucepan; stir smooth.
4. Cook over medium heat until thick and glossy, stirring constantly.
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper over browned ribs; spoon about half of the sweet-sour sauce over meat.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 45 minutes.
7. Turn ribs; cover with remaining sauce and bake for 30 minutes or more, or until well done.
8. Serves 6 as a main dish.
Reprinted with permission from Brown Sugar Recipe Bonanza
From the C and H Sugar Kitchen
Electronic format by Karen Mintzias
